data.name: SimBro: ResErection
data.detailed_description: Welcome to a sci-fi/cyberpunk universe where you run an adult brothel in a full brothel management simulator. Build your brothel from the ground up by adding new rooms to increase your staff capacity, keep staff happy, and provide unique services to clients. You can also customize your characters with different clothes, hairstyles, and weapons. In this game, you can earn experience points and a reputation through a turn-based combat system, running your brothel, and "interacting" with beautiful women. Level up your character and staff to better serve clients or fight off thugs. Take over the city by fighting gangs and upgrading your brothel.
data.about_the_game: Welcome to a sci-fi/cyberpunk universe where you run an adult brothel in a full brothel management simulator. Build your brothel from the ground up by adding new rooms to increase your staff capacity, keep staff happy, and provide unique services to clients. You can also customize your characters with different clothes, hairstyles, and weapons. In this game, you can earn experience points and a reputation through a turn-based combat system, running your brothel, and "interacting" with beautiful women. Level up your character and staff to better serve clients or fight off thugs. Take over the city by fighting gangs and upgrading your brothel.
data.short_description: Manage your brothel, fight gangs, and take over the city in this sci-fi/cyberpunk universe. Customize your characters with different clothes, hairstyles, and weapons.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (64-bit) or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E8400 / AMD Athlon 64 X2 6000+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 3000 / NVIDIA GeForce 8600 GT / AMD Radeon HD 5450
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit) or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1050 / AMD Radeon RX 560
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (High Sierra)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-3210 / Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel UHD Graphics 600 / AMD Radeon R5
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (High Sierra) or newer
  • 處理器: Apple M1 / Intel Core i5-8500
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Apple M1 GPU / AMD Radeon RX 560

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04+ (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-3220 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000 / AMD Radeon R5 / NVIDIA GeForce GT 730
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 3.3+ required, Some Linux distros may require Mono or libcurl for compatibility.
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 22.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1050 / AMD Radeon RX 560
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 3.3+ required, Some Linux distros may require Mono or libcurl for compatibility.
